---
title: |
  Attention \
  Models
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 1200
    scrollable: true
    include-in-header: "math.html"
    footer: m408.inqs.info/lectures/13a
    theme: [default, styles.scss]
    preview-links: true
    navigation-mode: vertical
    controls-layout: edges
    controls-tutorial: true
    slide-number: true
    pointer:
      pointerSize: 48
    incremental: false 
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
      chalk-width: 4
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    echo: true
    eval: false
    message: false
    warnings: false
    comment: "#>" 
    
revealjs-plugins:
  - pointer
  
filters: 
  - reveal-auto-agenda

editor: source
---

## Writing

What are the most important components when you write a 5-paragraph essay?

::: fragment
What are some things you do not want to see in an essay?
:::

## Translation

What are the most important words this sentence for translation?

::: {.fragment}
Simpson's paradox is a phenomenon in probability and statistics in which a trend appears in several groups of data but disappears or reverses when the groups are combined. 
:::

# Attention Models

## Attention Models

*Attention* models modify the *Encoder-Decoder* model by incorporating what is known as **attention** in the model.

::: {.fragment}

**Attention** is defined as incorporating the inputs short-term memory from the encoder model to the decoders inputs.

:::


## Encoder-Decoder

![](img/Encoder-Decoder.svg){fig-alt="An image displaying the Encoder-Decoder Architecture with corresponding LSTM cells."}

## LSTM Cell

![](img/lstm.svg){fig-alt="An image displaying the three gates of a long short-term memory (LSTM) cell."}

## Attention Model

![](img/attention_1.svg){fig-alt="An image displaying an Encoder-Decoder architecture with attention being incorporated to the first (and only) LSTM cell."}

## Attention Model

![](img/attention_2.svg){fig-alt="An image displaying an Encoder-Decoder architecture with attention being incorporated to the second LSTM cell."}

## Attention Model

![](img/attentio_3.svg){fig-alt="An image displaying an Encoder-Decoder architecture with attention being incorporated to the third LSTM cell."}

## Attention Model

![](img/attention.svg){fig-alt="An image displaying an Encoder-Decoder architecture with attention being incorporated to the third LSTM cell."}

## StatQuest

[Youtube Video](https://youtu.be/PSs6nxngL6k?si=dLkr-F36OTnSKAcV&t=50)
